info.name: TaskApp REST API
info.description:
Task Management API with HttpOnly Cookie Auth and X-API-Version headers

Contact Support:
 Name: Atul Singh
 Email: cocatul11@gmail.com

request.description: Returns a specific task (owned by user or admin)

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: apikey
Added as a part of security scheme: apikey

request.description: Deletes a task owned by the authenticated user

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: apikey

request.description: Returns paginated list of the authenticated user's tasks
Creates a new task for the authenticated user
Creates a new user account and returns a JWT token in an HttpOnly cookie

request.description: Returns a list of all registered users
Deletes any task by ID regardless of ownership
Returns paginated list of all tasks across all users
